name: Titan Heavy Industries
description: Soviet Heavy Industry, Cast Iron, Red Warning.
design_language: Surface treatment: thick cast iron plating with visible weld seams and rows of large bolt heads. Details: exposed hydraulic lines, heavy rectangular panel joins, red warning paint stripes on moving parts. Finish: raw unpainted metal with oil stains and wear marks.
color_palette: Cast Iron Grey, Red Warning Paint, Oil Black

name: Vector Dynamics
description: Modern Military, Matte White, Engineering Blue.
design_language: Surface treatment: flush matte panels with precision-cut edges and minimal visible fasteners. Details: integrated rail slots, engineering blue LED strip accents along seams, modular attachment points. Finish: clean matte white with tactical grey secondary panels.
color_palette: Matte White, Engineering Blue Glow, Tactical Grey

name: Helios Optronics
description: Aristocratic Tech, Ceramic White, Gold, Purple.
design_language: Surface treatment: smooth ceramic-finish panels with soft beveled edges and decorative gold inlay trim lines. Details: elegant symmetrical filigree grooves, royal purple energy glow on emitter surfaces, ornate housing covers. Finish: pristine polished white with gold accent borders.
color_palette: Ceramic White, Gold Trim, Royal Purple

name: Vulture Works
design_language: Surface treatment: mismatched salvaged plating with visible rust patches, rough welds, and patched holes. Details: exposed wire bundles strapped with cable ties, hand-painted hazard markings and graffiti tags, jury-rigged add-on components bolted on top. Finish: peeling paint over corroded metal.
color_palette: Rusted Metal, Hazard Orange, Graffiti Paint

name: Aether Science
description: Ancient Relic, Black Geometry, Red/Black Particles.
design_language: Surface treatment: perfectly smooth screwless panels with zero visible joints — surfaces appear grown rather than assembled. Details: faint geometric engravings that pulse with dim red-black energy, no mechanical protrusions, all functional ports flush with the surface. Finish: deep matte black with a faint inner luminescence.
color_palette: Monolithic Black, Red/Black Particles, Void Darkness
